item.title: Approval gates in identity generation — three-tier execute/propose/approve delegation model
item.intent: An agent with autonomy settings but no concrete action-level delegation rules will either over-ask or over-act. Generated AGENTS.md must include explicit approval gates with per-action examples.
item.description: Clawdius recon (2026-03-29): AGENTS.md has three-tier approval model with concrete per-action examples. ClawHQ generateAgents() only outputs tools/skills inventory.
steps: Extend blueprint autonomy_model with per-action delegation defaults
Update generateAgents() in src/design/identity/agents.ts to emit approval gates section
Add tests: each autonomy level produces correct delegation tiers
acceptanceCriteria: Generated AGENTS.md includes three-tier approval gates with per-action examples
Autonomy level (low/medium/high) maps to different delegation defaults
Heartbeat behavior patterns documented in generated AGENTS.md
